emails.subject: Cdn. EEI
emails.body: Cdn. EEI Elizabeth Good news, bad news. I have been confirmed as the co-chair of the committee, I have been confirmed as the co-chair of the committee. They have agreed to use the Enron Canadian EEI as the starting point, they want me to put together a memo describing/explaining the key provisions. They think a physical or hybrid (whatever that is) is the way to go, most still do not agree it is a physical market. It is a beautiful day with white fluffy snow falling, it is probably around -10 celcius. With respect to bullet number 2 above, do you have anything to give me so I don't have to do the work? Didn't you and Mark prepare something? Is Andy's paper a better starting place? Regards CJG

emails.subject: Re: Cdn. EEI
emails.body: Re: Cdn. EEI Hi Thanks for the good news It pleases me to know end to be creating EEI babies throughout the world bandwidth is also using it. Hooray Brenda should have sent a presentation I did that summarizes EEI Hope its helpful;avoid the DISASTER it only applies in the US. Also, Andy's article may be helpful. Have a great weekend.
